4.REGULATION (EU) 20241689 OF THE EUROPE.document_id: 4.REGULATION (EU) 20241689 OF THE EUROPEAN PARLIAMENT AND OF THE COUNCIL.html

extracted_info.title: Regulation on Artificial Intelligence (EU)
extracted_info.affected_sectors: All sectors that use artificial intelligence systems
key_requirements: Compliance with requirements for high-risk AI systems, including risk management, data and data governance, technical documentation, transparency and information to users, human oversight, and accuracy and robustness.
Obligations for providers and users of high-risk AI systems, including quality management, cooperation with competent authorities, and responsibilities regarding fundamental rights.
Notification requirements for high-risk AI systems, including registration, conformity assessment, and CE marking.

1.DIRECTIVE (UE) 20192161 DU PARLEMENT E.document_id: 1.DIRECTIVE (UE) 20192161 DU PARLEMENT EUROPÉEN ET DU CONSEIL.html

extracted_info.title: Directive (EU) 2019/2161 of the European Parliament and of the Council amending Council Directive 93/13/EEC and Directives 98/6/EC, 2005/29/EC and 2011/83/EU of the European Parliament and of the Council as regards the better enforcement and modernisation of Union consumer protection rules
key_requirements: Improving the enforcement of consumer protection rules and increasing the deterrence of infringements
Enhancing transparency for consumers, including on online marketplaces
Providing for stronger consumer remedies and better redress possibilities

6.人工知能関連技術の研究開発及び活用の推進に関する法律.html.document_id: 6.人工知能関連技術の研究開発及び活用の推進に関する法律.html

extracted_info.title: Act on the Promotion of Research, Development and Utilization of AI-related Technologies
key_requirements: Promote research and development of AI-related technologies as a foundation for economic and social development

Ensure the appropriate and effective utilization of AI-related technologies to significantly improve the efficiency and sophistication of administrative work and private business activities, as well as create new industries
Maintain Japan's capacity to conduct research and development of AI-related technologies and enhance the international competitiveness of the AI industry

5.中华人民共和国能源法__中国政府网.html.document_id: 5.中华人民共和国能源法__中国政府网.html

extracted_info.title: Energy Law of the People's Republic of China
extracted_info.affected_sectors: Energy sector, including coal, oil, natural gas, nuclear, hydropower, wind, solar, biomass, geothermal, and marine energy, as well as electricity, heat, and hydrogen
key_requirements: Promote high-quality energy development, ensure national energy security, and support the green and low-carbon transformation of the economy and society
Establish a clean, low-carbon, safe, and efficient new energy system

Implement the new energy security strategy, including energy consumption revolution, energy supply revolution, energy technology revolution, energy system reform, and comprehensive international cooperation

extracted_info.title: Public Law 117-169: To provide for reconciliation pursuant to title II of S. Con. Res. 14
extracted_info.affected_sectors: Corporations (other than S corporations, regulated investment companies, or real estate investment trusts) with average annual adjusted financial statement income exceeding $1 billion or $100 million
key_requirements: Imposition of a 15% alternative minimum tax on applicable corporations' adjusted financial statement income, with an offset for foreign tax credits
Definition of 'applicable corporation' based on average annual adjusted financial statement income thresholds
Exceptions for corporations with certain ownership changes or losses
